meta.freeProduct: Promotion = 'Free Product' tag (not $0); an order is free if it has any free-tagged item
meta.grain: true-new customer (each customer's first-ever acquisition; reactivations dropped)
meta.platformScope: ALL platforms (Shopify + Amazon Seller Central). Journey table has no platform field so it cannot be Shopify-scoped. Reconciles to customer_value_summary all-platform.
meta.dedupe: first acquisition_date per customer_id, ties by latest _last_updated
